title: Intelligent connector module and bus control system
abstract: An intelligent connector module includes: an intelligent connector adapted to connect a low voltage load in an electrical equipment to a low voltage power bus; and an electrical control switch module adapted to connect a high voltage load in the electrical equipment to a high voltage power bus. The electrical control switch module is connected to the intelligent connector and controls the power supply to the high voltage load according to a switch control signal from the intelligent connector. The number of the high voltage loads may be simply changed by increasing or reducing the number of the electrical control switch modules. In addition, the position of the high voltage load may be easily changed by adjusting the installation position of the electrical control switch module. Thereby, the intelligent connector module has good expansibility and universality.
claims:
Claims What is claimed is, 1. An intelligent connector module, comprising: an intelligent connector (100) adapted to connect a low voltage load (10) in an electrical equipment to a low voltage power bus (2); and an electrical control switch module (200) adapted to connect a high voltage load (20) in the electrical equipment to a high voltage power bus (3), wherein the electrical control switch module (200) is connected to the intelligent connector (100) and configured to control the power supply to the high voltage load (20) according to a switch control signal from the intelligent connector (100). 2. The intelligent connector module according to claim 1, wherein the electrical control switch module (200) comprises a driver (210) connected to the intelligent connector (100), and a switch element (220) connected between the high voltage power bus (3) and the high voltage load (20); and wherein the driver (210) is configured to drive the switch element (220) to be close or open according to the switch control signal from the intelligent connector (100), so as to control the power supply to the high voltage load (20). 3. The intelligent connector module according to claim 2, wherein the intelligent connector (100) comprises: a data bus interface (110) adapted to be connected to a data bus (1); a low voltage power bus interface (120) adapted to be connected to the low voltage power bus (2); a low voltage load interface (140) adapted to be connected to the low voltage load (10); and a micro control unit (130) connected to the data bus interface (110), the low voltage power bus interface (120) and the low voltage load interface (140). 4. The intelligent connector module according to claim 3, wherein the driver (210) of the electrical control switch module (200) is connected to the low voltage load interface (140) of the intelligent connector (100), and the switch control signal is transmitted to the driver (210) of the electrical control switch module (200) via the low voltage load interface (140) of the intelligent connector (100). 5. The intelligent connector module according to claim 4, wherein the low voltage load interface (140) of the intelligent connector (100) comprises a plurality of low voltage load connection ports, 

 wherein the electrical control switch module (200) is adapted to be connected with any one of the plurality of low voltage load connection ports of the intelligent connector (100), and wherein the low voltage load (10) is adapted to connect any one of the plurality of low voltage load connection ports of the intelligent connector (100). 6. The intelligent connector module according to claim 1, wherein the electrical control switch module (200) is an individual electrical device separated from the intelligent connector (100). 7. The intelligent connector module according to claim 6, wherein the electrical control switch module (200) is adapted to be mounted on the high voltage load (20) in a pluggable manner and electrically connected to the low voltage load interface (140) of the intelligent connector (100) via a wire. 8. The intelligent connector module according to claim 6, wherein the electrical control switch module (200) is adapted to be mounted on a fixation frame in a pluggable manner and electrically connected to the low voltage load interface (140) of the intelligent connector (100) and the high voltage load (20), respectively, via wires. 9. The intelligent connector module according to claim 6, wherein the intelligent connector (100) is adapted to be mounted on the data bus (1) in a pluggable manner. 10. The intelligent connector module according to claim 1, wherein the low voltage power bus (2) comprises a low voltage DC power bus, and the high voltage power bus (3) comprises an AC power bus or a high voltage DC power bus. 11. The intelligent connector module according to claim 1, wherein the electrical control switch module (200) comprises an electromagnetic relay. 12. A bus control system comprising a data bus (1), a low voltage power bus (2), a high voltage power bus (3), a main controller, a plurality of low voltage loads (10), a plurality of high voltage loads (20), and a plurality of intelligent connector modules according to claim 1, wherein the main controller is connected to the data bus (1), the low voltage power bus 

 (2) and the high voltage power bus (3); wherein the intelligent connectors (100) of the plurality of intelligent connector modules are connected in parallel to the data bus (1) and the low voltage power bus (2); wherein the electrical control switch modules (200) of the plurality of intelligent connector modules are connected in parallel to the high voltage power bus (3), and connected to the intelligent connectors (100), respectively; and wherein the plurality of low voltage loads (10) are connected to the intelligent connectors (100), respectively; and the plurality of high voltage loads (20) are connected to the electrical control switch modules (200), respectively.
